description: Billingo is a Hungarian online invoicing and billing platform for businesses. It provides tools for issuing invoices and receipts and for integrating external systems with its billing workflows.
summary: Billingo exposes one documented REST API surface: Billingo API v3 at https://api.billingo.hu/v3, authenticated with a Billingo-issued API key in the `X-API-KEY` header; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
